exercises.title: Redundant Computation Framework
exercises.description: Build a framework for fault-resistant redundant computation.
exercises.expectedOutput: Redundant computation framework with configurable redundancy
hints: Compare results at byte level for exact match
TMR requires at least 2 matching results
Consider different redundancy for different operations

exercises.title: Polynomial Checksum Verifier
exercises.description: Implement algebraic checksum verification for polynomial operations.
exercises.expectedOutput: Polynomial operation verifier using algebraic checksums
hints: Use random evaluation point for checksum
Test with injected faults to verify detection

exercises.title: Fault Attack Simulator
exercises.description: Create a fault attack simulator for educational purposes.
tasks: Model different fault types (bit flip, stuck, skip)
Simulate fault injection on KEM decapsulation
exercises.expectedOutput: Educational fault attack simulator with defense demo
hints: Show how DFA correlates faults with key bits

exercises.title: Secure Response Handler
exercises.description: Design a secure fault detection response system.
tasks: Add audit logging for security events
exercises.expectedOutput: Fault response handler with lockdown capability
hints: Use atomic operations for counter updates
